category_sources: Official Grafana repository README at https://github.com/grafana/mcp-grafana describes access to Grafana instances and surrounding ecosystem.
source_facts.description says this is an MCP server for Grafana.
display_name_sources: Official GitHub repository title and README use mcp-grafana: https://github.com/grafana/mcp-grafana
docs_sources: Official GitHub README links configuration and usage details.
Official Grafana documentation has a dedicated MCP documentation section and guides.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already contains https://github.com/grafana/mcp-grafana; per instruction repo is returned as null and not second-guessed.
tags_sources: Official Grafana docs and README describe Grafana instance access, dashboards, metrics, logs, and alerting workflows.
